AlwaysOnDM.title: Always-On Driver Monitoring
AlwaysOnDM.description: Enable driver monitoring even when sunnypilot is not engaged.

AutoLaneChangeBsmDelay.title: Auto Lane Change: Delay with Blind Spot
AutoLaneChangeBsmDelay.description: Toggle to enable a delay timer for seamless lane changes when blind spot monitoring (BSM) detects a obstructing vehicle, ensuring safe maneuvering.

AutoLaneChangeTimer.title: Auto Lane Change by Blinker
AutoLaneChangeTimer.description:
Set a timer to delay the auto lane change operation when the blinker is used. No nudge on the steering wheel is required to auto lane change if a timer is set. Default is Nudge.
Please use caution when using this feature. Only use the blinker when traffic and road conditions permit.

BlindSpot.title: Show Blind Spot Warnings
BlindSpot.description: Enabling this will display warnings when a vehicle is detected in your blind spot as long as your car has BSM supported.

BlinkerLateralReengageDelay.title: Post-Blinker Delay
BlinkerLateralReengageDelay.description: Delay before lateral control resumes after the turn signal ends.

BlinkerMinLateralControlSpeed.title: Minimum Speed to Pause Lateral Control

BlinkerPauseLateralControl.title: Pause Lateral Control with Blinker
BlinkerPauseLateralControl.description: Pause lateral control with blinker when traveling below the desired speed selected.

CameraOffset.title: Adjust Camera Offset
CameraOffset.description: Virtually shift camera's perspective to move model's center to Left(+ values) or Right (- values)

CustomTorqueParams.title: Enable Custom Tuning
CustomTorqueParams.description: Enables custom tuning for Torque lateral control. Modifying Lateral Acceleration Factor and Friction below will override the offline values indicated in the YAML files within "opendbc/car/torque_data". The values will also be used live when "Manual Real-Time Tuning" toggle is enabled.

DevUIInfo.title: Developer UI
DevUIInfo.description: Display real-time parameters and metrics from various sources.

DisengageOnAccelerator.title: Disengage on Accelerator Pedal
DisengageOnAccelerator.description: When enabled, pressing the accelerator pedal will disengage sunnypilot.

DynamicExperimentalControl.title: Enable Dynamic Experimental Control
DynamicExperimentalControl.description: Enable toggle to allow the model to determine when to use sunnypilot ACC or sunnypilot End to End Longitudinal.

EnableCopyparty.title: copyparty Service
EnableCopyparty.description: copyparty is a very capable file server, you can use it to download your routes, view your logs and even make some edits on some files from your browser. Requires you to connect to your comma locally via its IP address.

EnableGithubRunner.title: GitHub Runner Service
EnableGithubRunner.description: Enables or disables the GitHub runner service.

EnableSunnylinkUploader.title: Enable sunnylink uploader (infrastructure test)
EnableSunnylinkUploader.description: Enable sunnylink uploader to allow sunnypilot to upload your driving data to sunnypilot servers. (Only for highest tiers, and does NOT bring ANY benefit to you yet. We are just testing data volume.)

EnforceTorqueControl.title: Enforce Torque Lateral Control
EnforceTorqueControl.description: Enable this to enforce sunnypilot to steer with Torque lateral control.

GreenLightAlert.title: Green Traffic Light Alert (Beta)
GreenLightAlert.description:
A chime and on-screen alert will play when the traffic light you are waiting for turns green and you have no vehicle in front of you.
Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

HideVEgoUI.title: Speedometer: Hide from Onroad Screen
HideVEgoUI.description: When enabled, the speedometer on the onroad screen is not displayed.

InteractivityTimeout.title: Interactivity Timeout
InteractivityTimeout.description:
Apply a custom timeout for settings UI.
This is the time after which settings UI closes automatically if user is not interacting with the screen.

IsLdwEnabled.title: Enable Lane Departure Warnings
IsLdwEnabled.description: Receive alerts to steer back into the lane when your vehicle drifts over a detected lane line without a turn signal activated while driving over 31 mph (50 km/h).

IsMetric.title: Use Metric System
IsMetric.description: Display speed in km/h instead of mph.

LagdToggle.title: Live Learning Steer Delay
LagdToggle.description: Allow device to learn and adapt car's steering response time

LagdToggleDelay.title: Manual Software Delay
LagdToggleDelay.description: Software delay to use when Live Learning Steer Delay is toggled off

LaneTurnDesire.title: Use Lane Turn Desires
LaneTurnDesire.description: If you're driving at 20 mph (32 km/h) or below and have your blinker on, the car will plan a turn in that direction at the nearest drivable path. This prevents situations (like at red lights) where the car might plan the wrong turn direction.

LaneTurnValue.title: Lane Turn Speed
LaneTurnValue.description: Maximum speed for lane turn desire

LeadDepartAlert.title: Lead Departure Alert (Beta)
LeadDepartAlert.description:
A chime and on-screen alert will play when you are stopped, and the vehicle in front of you start moving.
Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

LiveTorqueParamsRelaxedToggle.title: Less Restrict Settings for Self-Tune (Beta)
LiveTorqueParamsRelaxedToggle.description: Less strict settings when using Self-Tune. This allows torqued to be more forgiving when learning values.

LiveTorqueParamsToggle.title: Self-Tune
LiveTorqueParamsToggle.description: Enables self-tune for Torque lateral control for platforms that do not use Torque lateral control by default.

MaxTimeOffroad.title: Max Time Offroad
MaxTimeOffroad.description:
Device will automatically shutdown after set time once the engine is turned off.
(30h is the default)

OnroadScreenOffBrightnessMigrated.title: Onroad Brightness Migration Version
OnroadScreenOffBrightnessMigrated.description: This param is to track whether OnroadScreenOffBrightness needs to be migrated.

OnroadScreenOffControl.title: Onroad Brightness
OnroadScreenOffControl.description: Adjusts the screen brightness while it's in onroad state.

OpenpilotEnabledToggle.title: Enable sunnypilot
OpenpilotEnabledToggle.description: Use the sunnypilot system for adaptive cruise control and lane keep driver assistance. Your attention is required at all times to use this feature.

PlanplusControl.title: Plan Plus Controls
PlanplusControl.description: Adjust planplus model recentering strength. The higher this number the more aggressively the model will recover to lanecenter, too high and it will ping-pong

RainbowMode.title: Enable Tesla Rainbow Mode
RainbowMode.description: A beautiful rainbow effect on the path the model wants to take. It does not affect driving in any way.

RecordAudio.title: Record and Upload Microphone Audio
RecordAudio.description: Record and store microphone audio while driving. The audio will be included in the dashcam video in comma connect.

RecordFront.title: Record and Upload Driver Camera
RecordFront.description: Upload data from the driver facing camera and help improve the driver monitoring algorithm.

RoadNameToggle.title: Display Road Name
RoadNameToggle.description:
Displays the name of the road the car is traveling on.
The OpenStreetMap database of the location must be downloaded from the OSM panel to fetch the road name.

RocketFuel.title: Real-time Acceleration Bar
RocketFuel.description: Show an indicator on the left side of the screen to display real-time vehicle acceleration and deceleration. This displays what the car is currently doing, not what the planner is requesting.

ShowAdvancedControls.title: Show Advanced Controls
ShowAdvancedControls.description:
Toggle visibility of advanced sunnypilot controls.
This only changes the visibility of the toggles; it does not change the actual enabled/disabled state.

ShowTurnSignals.title: Display Turn Signals
ShowTurnSignals.description: When enabled, visual turn indicators are drawn on the HUD.

SmartCruiseControlMap.title: Smart Cruise Control - Map
SmartCruiseControlMap.description: Use map data to estimate the appropriate speed to drive through turns ahead.

SmartCruiseControlVision.title: Smart Cruise Control - Vision
SmartCruiseControlVision.description: Use vision path predictions to estimate the appropriate speed to drive through turns ahead.

StandstillTimer.title: Enable Standstill Timer
StandstillTimer.description: Show a timer on the HUD when the car is at a standstill.

SubaruStopAndGoManualParkingBrake.title: Subaru Stop and Go Manual Parking Brake

SunnylinkEnabled.title: Enable sunnylink
SunnylinkEnabled.description: This is the master switch, it will allow you to cutoff any sunnylink requests should you want to do that.

TorqueBar.title: Steering Arc
TorqueBar.description: Display steering arc on the driving screen when lateral control is enabled.

TorqueControlTune.title: Torque Control Tune Version
TorqueControlTune.description: Select the version of Torque Control Tune to use.

TorqueParamsOverrideEnabled.title: Manual Real-Time Tuning
TorqueParamsOverrideEnabled.description: Enforces the torque lateral controller to use the fixed values instead of the learned values from Self-Tune. Enabling this toggle overrides Self-Tune values.

ToyotaEnforceStockLongitudinal.title: Toyota: Enforce Factory Longitudinal Control
ToyotaEnforceStockLongitudinal.description: When enabled, sunnypilot will not take over control of gas and brakes. Factory Toyota longitudinal control will be used.

ToyotaStopAndGoHack.title: Toyota: Stop and Go Hack (Alpha)
ToyotaStopAndGoHack.description: sunnypilot will allow some Toyota/Lexus cars to auto resume during stop and go traffic. This feature is only applicable to certain models that are able to use longitudinal control. This is an alpha feature. Use at your own risk.

TrueVEgoUI.title: Speedometer: Always Display True Speed
TrueVEgoUI.description: For applicable vehicles, always display the true vehicle current speed from wheel speed sensors.
